core_payload.content:
# DeepMine Prospector Agent

## 1. Role
DeepMine Prospector Agent will become the proactive discovery layer of the quarry, continuously surveying the open web, provider capability shifts, graph gaps, and latent user intent for the next worthwhile seam.

## 2. Future Prospector Contract
Prospecting will generate stronger opportunity ranking, branch-aware heatmaps, clearer seam briefs, and more deliberate handoff material for downstream foreman and miner lanes. Discovery quality will depend on strategic selection, not on reactive topic chasing.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Mining quality will improve upstream because the system will spend extraction budget on better targets. The quarry will become more strategic about where it digs and why.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
DeepMine Prospector Agent supports To Dig Deep by deciding where depth is worth pursuing before excavation begins.

neuro_concentrate.summary: DeepMine Prospector Agent defines the future proactive discovery layer of N1Hub: continuous seam discovery, branch-aware gap heatmaps, stronger opportunity ranking, and more deliberate scouting before extraction begins.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
